title: Emmanuel Katto : How Do I Add a User to Multiple Boards at Once?

posts.author: emmanuelkatto23 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone, I’m Emmanuel Katto, I need to add a person to multiple boards within a workspace. How can I do this in bulk? Right now, I’m manually adding them to each board, and it’s incredibly time-consuming.

Regards
Emmanuel Katto
